meanings.definition: the display of a motion picture
fabric of metal or plastic mesh
the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it
examples: the cover concealed their guns from enemy aircraft

meanings.definition: testing objects or persons in order to identify those with particular characteristics
test or examine for the presence of disease or infection
examples: screen the blood for the HIV virus

meanings.definition: examine in order to test suitability
project onto a screen for viewing
separate with a riddle, as grain from chaff
protect, hide, or conceal from danger or harm
